title: pelargonium capituliforme
intro: Pelargonium capituliforme, also known as Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium capituliforme have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal remedies such as cough drops and throat sprays.
